history.title: Call history depth
history.description: Choose, for each of the three call-list sensors, whether it should be limited by a number of calls or by a number of days. You can change this again later under Settings -> Devices & Services -> FRITZ!Box Anrufe -> Configure.

data.call_log_days_eingehend: Answered calls: number of days (if 'Number of days' selected)

data.call_log_days_verpasst: Missed calls: number of days (if 'Number of days' selected)

data_description.call_log_limit_type_eingehend: Whether the fritzbox_anrufe_eingehend sensor (Answered calls) is limited by count or by time period.
data_description.call_log_limit_type_ausgehend: Whether the outgoing-calls sensor is limited by count or by time period.
data_description.call_log_limit_type_verpasst: Whether the missed-calls sensor is limited by count or by time period.
